scripts.dev: pnpm exec concurrently "pnpm --dir renderer run dev" "pnpm --dir main run dev"
scripts.update: git fetch origin && git merge origin/master
scripts.sync-upstream: git remote get-url upstream 2>nul || git remote add upstream https://github.com/Kvan7/Exiled-Exchange-2.git && git fetch upstream && git checkout master && git merge upstream/master && git push origin master
